name: Snowflake Arctic
archDisplay: Dense-MoE Hybrid (10B dense transformer + 128x3.66B residual MoE experts, top-2 gating)
note: Apache-2.0 480B-total/17B-active dense+MoE hybrid (128 experts) tuned for enterprise SQL/code/instruction-following, trained for under $2M.
tpsNote: 480B total parameters (Q4 ~291GB) require a multi-GPU server; not runnable on a single consumer GPU, and mainline llama.cpp needs a community fork for Arctic's architecture.
